final:
module t_flip_flop (
    input wire T,
    input wire reset_clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge reset_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // toggle Q
        end
    end
endmodule
